raw_consumer_statement:
A local resturant ( XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ) overcharged for my my lunch on XX/XX/year>. when I reached out to them they were not responding, so i filed a dispute with Barclays Bank the credit card issuer. Barclays Bank has to provide this chargeback service, but they denied and instructed me to go back to the merchant and get the refund. 

I filed complait with XXXX  and consumer protection bureau againt the restaurant, but again they did not respond to those complaints. 

I pay a credit card membership fee of XXXX XXXX  for the credit card from Barclays and they are not providing the service as per the ageement. 

I am seeking the refund of that membership fee plus the over billed charges from the restaurant an amount of {$12.00}. 

They bank also falsely claims that i did not submit the required records inspite of me submitting receipts online through theor system. They do not maintain proper records and mails a letter to a worng address out of state and copies the digital cpoy to me by email. They have serious compliance and record maintennace issues. 


Kindly help. 

Thanks, XXXX
